apis.name: API Gateway
apis.desc: Main Travel Kingdom API Gateway - handles all search, static data, auth, booking, and wallet endpoints

apis.name: Booking Service
apis.desc: Travel Kingdom booking management API for creating and managing reservations

apis.name: Inventory Service
apis.desc: Travel Kingdom inventory management API for hotels, flights, and availability

apis.name: User Service
apis.desc: Travel Kingdom user management and authentication API

apis.name: Payment Service
apis.desc: Travel Kingdom payment processing and wallet management API

apis.name: Analytics Service
apis.desc: Travel Kingdom analytics and reporting API for business intelligence

apis.name: Metrics Service
apis.desc: Travel Kingdom metrics and monitoring API for system observability

apis.name: SuperAdmin API
apis.desc: Travel Kingdom platform administration API for tenant management and notifications

apis.name: B2B Admin Server
apis.desc: Internal server for B2B Admin portal handling staff onboarding and specific admin functions

apis.name: Admin Service
apis.desc: Admin API service to expose /admin/* routes through the API gateway (Kong)
